registrationsDisabled.title: Registrations are temporarily closed.

zod.usernameMin: Username must be at least 3 characters
zod.usernameMax: Username can be at most 50 characters

zod.passwordSpecial: Password must contain at least one special character

zod.acceptPrivacy: You must accept the Privacy Policy to proceed

zod.confirmDeleteAccount: You must confirm you want to delete the account

passwordReset.expired: Link expired. Request a new one.

consent.termsLabelPrefix: I have read and accept the

consent.privacyLabelPrefix: I have read and accept the

oauthError.oauth_invalid: Invalid OAuth parameters. Please try again.
oauthError.oauth_failed: Error signing in with Google. Please try again.
oauthError.oauth_init_failed: Unable to start Google login. Please try again.
oauthError.oauth_user_failed: Unable to create or find the account. Please try again.
oauthError.oauth_domain_blocked: We don't accept registrations with this email provider.
oauthError.maintenance: The site is under maintenance. Only administrators can sign in.
oauthError.blocked: Your IP has been blocked. Please contact support.
oauthError.account_deleted: Your account is being deleted. To cancel the request please contact support.

reason.deletion_requested: You requested the deletion of your account. The purge will happen within 30 days; to cancel please contact support.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.

resetPassword.title: New password
resetPassword.subtitle: Choose a new password for your account.

verifyEmail.title: Verify your email
verifyEmail.subtitle: We sent a 6-digit code to your email address. Enter it below to complete your registration.

verifyDevice.title: New device detected
verifyDevice.subtitle: We sent a verification code to your email address. Enter it below to confirm it's you.

mfa.title: Two-factor verification
mfa.subtitleTotp: Enter the code generated by your authenticator app.
mfa.subtitleRecovery: Enter one of the recovery codes you saved. Each code can be used only once.
mfa.switchToRecovery: Don't have access to your authenticator app? Use a recovery code

staffInvite.title: You've been invited
staffInvite.invitedByPrefix: invited you to join the staff team with the role of
staffInvite.invalidLinkMessage: The invitation does not exist or has been removed.
staffInvite.expiredMessage: This invitation is no longer valid. Ask an administrator to send a new one.
staffInvite.acceptedMessage: You've already completed registration with this invitation. Sign in to access the admin panel.
staffInvite.declinedMessage: You declined the invitation. If you changed your mind, contact an administrator.

staffRegister.title: Create your Staff account
staffRegister.withRolePrefix: Your account will be created with the role
staffRegister.redirectNote: When done you'll be redirected to the admin panel.

common.turnstileFailed: Bot check failed. Reload the page and try again.
common.tooManyAttempts: Too many failed attempts. Try again in a few minutes.
common.tooManyRequests: Too many requests. Try again in a few minutes.
common.tooManyChecks: You've made too many checks. Try again in a few minutes.
common.createAccountFailed: Unable to create the account. Please try again.

signIn.invalidCredentials: Wrong email or password, please try again.
signIn.banned: Your account has been suspended. Contact support.
